openSettings.menu: 點擊左下角的個人頭像或名稱，再選擇「設定」。
openSettings.shortcut: 也可以按 Ctrl+, 直接開啟設定。

labels.profileMenu: profile menu in the lower-left corner

openSettings.menu: Select your profile picture or name in the lower-left corner, then select “Settings”.
openSettings.shortcut: You can also press Ctrl+, to open Settings directly.
